name: project-harness
description: A portable project layer for precise context routing, durable task Journals, and verified completion.

interface.shortDescription: Route context, preserve task continuity, and verify completion.
interface.longDescription: Install a small repository layer that routes scoped context, restores checkpointed task Journals, and finishes work through explicit verification and review.
defaultPrompt: Set up Project Harness in this repository.
Create a Journal for this long-running task.
Verify and finish the active Journal.
